title: phaseolus lasiocarpus var. balansae
intro: Phaseolus lasiocarpus var. balansae, also known as Balansa bean or Balansa's bean, is a variety of the Phaseolus lasiocarpus plant, which is a type of legume native to parts of Asia and Southeast Asia. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Phaseolus lasiocarpus var. balansae include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
